description: Benchmark for long-list entity extraction under layout, OCR, scale, and long-range cross-page evidence complexity.

provenance.note: Private production documents were used only for visual layout review. The repository contains synthetic generated artifacts only.

instances.provenance: Synthetic generated document. Private production references were used only for visual layout review; no production PDFs, names, account numbers, or raw customer data are included in this repository.

layout_revision.purpose: improve production-like document structure and layout variation

complexity_stressors.page_breaks: Target lists or supporting sections continue across page boundaries, often with repeated headers or inherited context.
complexity_stressors.multi_row: One logical record can include wrapped notes, descriptions, source notes, clause prose, or continuation rows rather than a single flat row.
complexity_stressors.duplicates: Duplicate or near-duplicate distractor material appears in support sections. Version 2.0 emphasizes prior-term, archive, summary-card, and repeated-support distractors rather than exact duplicate target rows.
complexity_stressors.large_doc: Documents contain hundreds to thousands of target records, or enough pages to expose truncation and list-completeness failures.
complexity_stressors.multiple_tables: Target records are mixed with summaries, ledgers, schedules, support tables, or empty/no-claims tables.
complexity_stressors.multi_column: Some pages use two-column or form-like layouts that stress reading order.
complexity_stressors.merged_cells: Tables use merged cells, section-spanning rows, or colspan/rowspan-style layout structure.
complexity_stressors.ocr_condition: Released transcripts are OCR output from rendered PDF page images.
complexity_stressors.long_range_evidence: A target record may require joining evidence from distant sections of the same PDF.
complexity_stressors.heterogeneous_record_list: A single output list may contain several record types with different fields.
complexity_stressors.layout_randomization: Rows use several realistic layouts within one document, including tables, cards, wrapped audit lines, and continuation blocks.
complexity_stressors.inherited_context: Fields such as schedule, fuel type, policy period, location, or coverage scope must be inherited from section headers.
complexity_stressors.split_records: One target record can be split across multiple visible lines or cards.
complexity_stressors.non_target_rows: Support, subtotal, prior-period, and note rows are interleaved with target records.
complexity_stressors.natural_long_range_join: Distant evidence is connected by normal business references rather than explicit benchmark join instructions.
